title: State Transaction Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for the Lumina atomic state machine. Defines the envelope for any transactional workflow — admin commands, staged-file approvals, domain-physics updates, and future operations. Every transaction follows the PROPOSED → VALIDATED → COMMITTED → FINALIZED lifecycle (with ROLLED_BACK as the abort branch).

transaction_id.description: UUID v4 globally unique transaction identifier.

operation.description: Logical operation name (e.g. invite_user, stage_file, update_domain_physics).

actor_id.description: ID of the actor who created or last advanced this transaction.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the transaction was first PROPOSED.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the most recent state transition.

metadata.description: Open dict for domain-specific context. The state machine kernel never inspects this.

history.description: Ordered list recording every state transition.

transaction_state.description: Legal states in the 4-stage ACK lifecycle.

state.description: The state that was transitioned TO.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when this transition occurred.
